title: Phase 2: GSI (Global Secondary Index)
description: Implement hash-partitioned index with optional sorted range key. GSIs support partition-only and partition+sort configurations, with put/remove/update operations and query with sort conditions and direction. See Vision.md for full details.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Status: planned Phase 2 scope. Did: reviewed GSI feature specs + related query/table specs; captured decisions (skip index on missing keys, raw JSON ordering). Next: implement GSI creation/query/operations in Python+Rust and step defs. Blockers: Vision.md not found via kbs wiki; proceeding from features.
